name: Office Portable Cabin
description:
Office Portable Cabin — A Workspace Ready in 7 Days

SAMAN office portable cabin — 22×12×9 ft. Lockable steel door, cross-ventilation window, and AC provision as standard. Delivered to your site in 7-21 days.

An office portable cabin gives you a fully functional workspace — lockable, AC-ready, and weather-tight — without the cost or delay of permanent construction. You get a working office in 7 days, not 90. This page is for small business owners, site managers, and anyone who needs a clean, practical office space fast. If you need the full range of portable cabin types for every use, the hub page covers everything.

What Comes in an Office Portable Cabin

Every office portable cabin from SAMAN is factory-built and arrives complete. You do not assemble it on site — it is placed and ready to use.

Standard office configuration includes:

  • MS frame structure — mild steel throughout. Handles wind loads up to 200 km/hr without flex or noise.
  • Insulated wall panels — 40 mm thickness. Keeps the interior 8–10°C cooler than outside. Essential for South India summers.
  • 1 AC provision point — bracket-mounted, wired and ready. You supply the AC unit; we supply the slot.
  • Vinyl flooring — easy to clean, professional underfoot, suitable for daily office use.
  • 1 lockable steel door — heavy-duty hinges, key lock, weather seal.
  • 2 windows — cross-ventilation design. Natural light on both sides.
  • 2 electrical points — one for your desk, one for overhead lighting.

Factory-built office portable cabin — lockable door, full-width glazed panels, and a covered deck. Every unit from SAMAN arrives complete and ready to use.

Everything above is standard. If you need an extra window, an additional door, or a specific floor finish, tell us before the cabin leaves the factory. Changes after delivery cost more and take longer.

Need a cabin with an attached bathroom as well? See our portable cabin with toilet — that is a separate product built as a combined unit.

Which Size Office Portable Cabin Do You Need

This is the question most buyers ask first. Here is a plain answer:

Size Fits comfortably Best for
10 × 12 ft 2–3 people Single-desk setup, site manager's room, small admin office
10 × 14 ft 3–4 people Two desks with storage, small team workspace
12 × 16 ft 4–6 people Three desks plus a small meeting corner

The 22×12×9 ft office portable cabin — enough room for 3 desks, storage, and an AC wall mount. Glass panels on two sides bring in natural light all day.

The 10 × 12 ft is our most ordered size for office use. It fits one full-size desk, 2 chairs, a small cabinet, and a wall-mounted AC — with room to move. If you need space for 2 people working at the same time, go to 10 × 14 ft.

If you only need a very small single-person space, the small portable cabin at 8 × 10 ft may suit you better — though most office buyers find it too compact for daily work comfort.

Not sure which size fits your layout? WhatsApp us your room count or floor plan. We confirm the right size within 10 minutes.

Who This Office Portable Cabin Is For

Three types of buyers order this cabin most:

Small business owners who need a clean, separate office on their own property — a stockroom, a dispatch room, or an accounts cabin — without spending on civil construction.

Site managers and project supervisors who need a working admin space on a project site. Not a construction cabin — a proper desk, a locked door, and a working AC.

A fully enclosed office portable cabin — meeting table, glass walls, and natural light. Ready for site managers and small business teams from day one.

Retailers and warehouse operators who need a backroom office that can relocate when the business shifts. Brick walls cannot do that. This cabin can.

This cabin is designed for basic, daily office use. If you need a portable office cabin with a false ceiling, premium interior walls, and full corporate fit-out, that is a different product built to a higher interior specification. We make that too, under a separate range.

If your requirements may grow and you want a cabin that expands as your team does, see the modular portable cabin — built to add rooms without rebuilding.

Why an Office Portable Cabin Instead of a Permanent Structure

Three reasons, and they are all practical:

Speed. A brick office takes 60–90 days to build. This cabin is on your site in 7 days. If your project starts next week, permanent construction is not a choice.

Cost. A permanent room of comparable size costs Rs 4–6 lakh in construction — materials, labour, and delays included. This cabin starts at Rs 1,95,000, fully built and delivered.

Flexibility. If your site moves, your office moves with it. If your business shifts location, the cabin shifts too. A permanent wall cannot do either.

Why Businesses Choose SAMAN for Their Office Portable Cabin

We have completed 500+ projects across South India. That number matters because it means we have built office cabins for every kind of buyer — retail operators, infrastructure companies, school administrators, and factory managers. We know what an office buyer needs and what they do not.

Delivery to Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, and Kochi takes 7 days. Every cabin passes 52 quality checkpoints in our factory before it leaves — doors, locks, electrics, wall panels, and waterproofing. We do not ship a cabin that has not passed every check.

SAMAN offers a 25-year structural warranty on every unit. No other portable cabin manufacturer in India offers this in writing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I fit an AC in an office portable cabin?

Yes. Every SAMAN office portable cabin comes with 1 AC provision point as standard — the bracket mounting and wiring are already in place. You provide the AC unit; any standard 1-ton or 1.5-ton split AC fits. If you need 2 AC points for a larger cabin, request it before manufacture. Adding it after delivery is possible but costs an additional Rs 3,500–Rs 5,000.

How much does an office portable cabin cost?

Our office portable cabin starts at Rs 1,95,000 for a 10 × 12 ft unit with standard fit-out. A 12 × 16 ft unit with upgraded flooring runs between Rs 2,60,000 and Rs 3,10,000 depending on wall panel spec and electrical points. We send a fixed price quote within 2 hours of your enquiry — no hidden delivery charges for South India sites.

Can I use it as a long-term office, not just a temporary one?

Yes. The MS frame structure is built for a 25-year lifespan. Many buyers use these cabins as permanent on-site offices for 5–10 years without any structural issues. The cabin is fully weatherproofed — not just rain-covered — so you can use it as your main office indefinitely. If your requirements change, it relocates. A permanent building cannot.

Get Your Office Portable Cabin in 7 Days

Tell us your size, your location, and how many people it needs to fit. We will send you a price and a delivery date within 2 hours.

Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937
short_description:
🖥️ 22×12×9 ft — working office in 7 days · Small Business · Site Manager · Backroom Admin · AC-ready. No construction needed.

Office portable cabin — 22×12×9 ft MS structure, factory-built and delivered complete. AC provision point, vinyl flooring, lockable steel door, and 2 electrical points as standard. Ready to use the day it arrives. For small business owners, site managers, and backroom office setups that need to be running fast.

Size
22×12×9 ft
Capacity
4–6 people
Frame
MS frame · 40mm insulated walls
AC Provision
1 point standard · wired
Flooring
Vinyl — office grade
Electrical Points
2 standard
Starting Price
Rs 1,95,000
Delivery
7-21 days · India
Warranty
25 years structural
Projects Completed
500+ across South India

Need a toilet attached? See portable cabin with toilet. Need to expand later? See modular portable cabin. Need corporate fit-out? See portable office cabin.
